race.comment: MICROGRAVITY (1) went around at $26.00 but defied the market with an eye-catching third on debut over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Probably goes back again from a wide draw but over the longer trip with race experience on board he looks the one to beat. AKUMA (6) rallied late to fill a placing for the first time at his latest appearance over 1200m at Tamworth. That followed a five-week break so he will strip fitter. Starting to show some positive signs and is worth following. ERNIEGY (2) made it three minor placings from three runs this prep when he worked home well but found one better over this distance at Dubbo recently. Won't spend a cent from the inside gate so another big run is anticipated. REDALUCA GIRL (11) did nothing first-up over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Better placed out to this trip and can improve sharply. CZECH HER OUT (7) is new to this trip but can sneak into the money with the right run.
